subcodes.first_line: After recognition of God, glorified be His majesty, and steadfastness, no deed hath been nor shall be mightier than teaching. A hundred thousand blessings [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: بعد از عرفان حق جل جلاله و استقامت هیچ امری اعظم از تبلیغ نبوده و نیست صدهزار طوبی
subcodes.subjects: @chastisement and requital, @teaching the Cause; call to teach, @suffering and imprisonment, @praise and encouragement
